pages.notes: Back inside cover of the diary. Plain striped pattern (notebook endpaper), no text or markings other than a small ink spot near the bottom right.

pages.full_text:
Camping Relax
Via del Lavoro, 10 - 40048 Pian del Voglio (BO)
tel/fax +39 0534 98 228 - email: campingrelax@alice.it
www.sophieallport.com
pages.notes: Back outside cover of the diary (striped notebook). A printed oval sticker from 'Camping Relax', located at Via del Lavoro, 10 - 40048 Pian del Voglio (BO), Italy (province of Bologna). Contact details: tel/fax +39 0534 98 228, email campingrelax@alice.it. At the bottom of the page, a small printed label reads 'www.sophieallport.com' (the notebook manufacturer/designer). No handwritten text on this page. The campsite sticker suggests the family stayed at Camping Relax, Pian del Voglio, at some point during the volume's span (2003–2019); no date can be determined from this page alone.
